message:
feat(runtime): Add PyValue-First APIs for list, dict, set operations

Phase 3 of monomorphization fix - adds PyValue-typed container APIs
that compile ONCE regardless of usage count, preventing compile explosion.

New APIs in builtins.zig (compile ONCE):
- List: pyListAppendPV, pyListExtendPV, pyListInsertPV, pyListPopPV,
        pyListRemovePV, pyListClearPV, pyListReversePV, pyListSortPV
- Dict: pyDictGetPV, pyDictSetPV, pyDictPopPV, pyDictUpdatePV,
        pyDictKeysPV, pyDictValuesPV, pyDictItemsPV, pyDictClearPV
- Set:  pySetAddPV, pySetRemovePV, pySetDiscardPV, pySetPopPVFunc,
        pySetClearPV, pySetContainsPV
- Generic: pyLenPV, pyContainsPV, pyGetItemPV, pySetItemPV

New APIs in equality.zig:
- pyValueLt, pyValueLe, pyValueGt, pyValueGe, pyValueNe

This provides the foundation for codegen to emit PyValue APIs when
dealing with uncertain types, while keeping typed fast paths for
certain types.
